string.text:
The Ohio Ordinance HCAR (Heavy Counter Assault Rifle) is a modern, versatile firearm renowned for its exceptional performance and adaptability. Designed for military and law enforcement applications, the HCAR combines the reliability and firepower of a battle rifle with the agility and ergonomics of an assault rifle. It features a gas piston operating system, enabling reliable operation in various environments and reducing recoil for improved control. With a rugged construction, ambidextrous controls, and a modular design, the HCAR offers users the ability to customize it for their specific needs, whether in close-quarters combat or long-range engagements. Its compatibility with various accessories, such as optics, suppressors, and rail-mounted accessories, further enhances its effectiveness. In summary, the HCAR is a cutting-edge firearm engineered to excel in the most demanding and dynamic combat scenarios.

 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS:
 %c[d_purple] - %c[ui_gray_2] Scopes: Most collimator sights for Picatinny/Weaver system
 %c[d_purple] - %c[ui_gray_2] Silencer: Suppressor: AAC 7.62 SND-6 Suppressor
